title: Website development for a CA Athletic Apparel Retailer company - PDP
overview: Canadian multinational athletic apparel retailer with an e-commerce site for buying, managing, and canceling orders. I worked on the front-end of the PDP section: building views from mockups, applying accessibility and responsiveness, fixing issues, and contributing shared components to a pattern library. Later I led the PDP migration to a new repo with component updates and performance improvements.
description: Developed front-end features for product detail page section of major Canadian athletic apparel e-commerce platform, serving thousands of daily users
Built responsive, accessible layouts from mockups, ensuring consistent user experience across all devices and screen sizes
Created and maintained 15+ shared components in pattern library, reducing development time for new features
Led migration of PDP page to new repository, improving page performance through code splitting and lazy loading
Ensured WCAG 2.0 compliance across all product detail page views using Axe DevTools
Implemented A/B test variants for conversion optimization, supporting data-driven design decisions
Collaborated in Agile/Scrum environment with crossfunctional teams, participating in estimation and stakeholder demos

title: Website development for a CA Athletic Apparel Retailer company - Checkout
overview: Canadian multinational athletic apparel retailer with an e-commerce site for buying, managing, and canceling orders. I worked on the front-end of the Checkout section: building views from mockups, applying accessibility and responsiveness, fixing issues, and contributing shared components to a pattern library.
description: Developed front-end components for checkout section of leading Canadian athletic apparel e-commerce platform, supporting critical purchase flow
Built responsive, accessible interfaces from design mockups, ensuring seamless user experience across desktop and mobile
Created reusable UI components stored in shared pattern library, improving development efficiency across teams
Fixed bugs and extended existing functionality, maintaining high code quality and reliability
Participated in estimation, demos, and Agile ceremonies, contributing to transparent project delivery
Maintained WCAG 2.0 accessibility compliance for critical checkout flow, ensuring inclusive user experience

title: Website development and accessibility compliance for a US Airline company
overview: US airline operating flights to over 100 destinations across the US, Alaska, Hawaii, Canada, Costa Rica, and Mexico. I worked on front-end development: building views from mockups, improving accessibility and responsiveness, fixing UI issues, and contributing to a site-wide WCAG 2.0 compliance effort. I also supported back-end bug fixing on MVC pages.
description: Built new front-end views for US airline's booking platform, serving travelers across multiple destinations
Updated entire site to meet WCAG 2.0 accessibility standards, ensuring compliance for all user interactions
Developed responsive, accessible interfaces for flight booking, account management, and travel planning
Fixed bugs in MVC pages (back-end support), improving overall system reliability
Customized forms, error messages, and tab order for accessibility, enhancing usability for users with disabilities
Used Sauce Labs for cross-browser testing, ensuring consistent experience across browsers and devices

title: Multiple website development for a US Digital Content Creation company
overview: US digital content and entertainment portfolio spanning TV, film, digital media, live events, merchandising, and studio production. As part of the UI team, I focused on theming and visual updates aligned with client branding, bug fixing, responsive behavior, performance improvements, and research for potential new site features.
description: Updated and themed UI for portfolio of multi-platform entertainment brands, ensuring brand consistency across digital properties
Performed bug fixing, responsive adaptations, and performance improvements, enhancing user experience
Researched and implemented new features for digital content platform, staying current with web technologies

title: Website development for a specific internal application for US Energy company
overview: US energy infrastructure company operating across natural gas pipelines, liquid pipelines, and energy segments. I owned end-to-end UI development from mockups to implementation, proposed designs for new features, and collaborated directly with the client on application look-and-feel and navigation flow.
description: Led entire UI development from mockups to implementation, delivering complete solution for energy infrastructure company
Created design proposals and discussed functionality with client, ensuring alignment with business requirements
Built responsive, accessible internal application for energy infrastructure company, supporting internal operations

title: Website development for multiple enterprise platforms across technology, retail, finance, and media sectors
domain: Software Development, Enterprise Web Applications, Media, Retail, Finance, Technology
overview: Worked on multiple web application projects for global clients across technology, retail, finance, and media. Responsibilities included UI maintenance, redesigns, new feature development, and reusable component creation across enterprise platforms, e-commerce solutions, internal business tools, and innovation initiatives.
description: Developed and maintained web application UIs for global clients across technology, retail, finance, and media sectors
Implemented responsive layouts and pixel-perfect designs from mockups and PSDs, ensuring visual consistency
Built reusable UI components and pattern libraries, improving development efficiency across projects
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on enterprise platforms, e-commerce sites, and internal business tools
